name: phstaging2-local-deploy
description: Local deployment orchestration for Phoenix Phase 2 contracts

scripts.deploy:local: npm run clean:local && forge script script/DeployMocks.s.sol:DeployMocks --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast --slow
scripts.//serve-and-dev: Story 003 — API server + local dev orchestration
scripts.dev: npm run clean:local && npm run start:anvil & sleep 3 && npm run deploy:local && ./simulate-yield.sh && npm run extract:addresses && npm run generate:ts-anvil && npm run serve
scripts.//local-test-flows: Story 005 (full-flow), Story 023 (nft-flow), Story 045.5 (nudge-payout, balancer-donation) — end-to-end local test runs
scripts.test:nft-flow: npm run clean:local && anvil --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8545 --chain-id 31337 & sleep 3 && npm run deploy:local && forge script script/interactions/TestNFTMintAndClaimFlow.s.sol:TestNFTMintAndClaimFlow --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast && kill %1
scripts.test:nudge-payout: npm run clean:local && anvil --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8545 --chain-id 31337 & sleep 3 && npm run deploy:local && forge script script/interactions/TestNudgePayout.s.sol:TestNudgePayout --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast && kill %1
scripts.test:balancer-donation: npm run clean:local && anvil --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8545 --chain-id 31337 & sleep 3 && npm run deploy:local && forge script script/interactions/TestBalancerDonation.s.sol:TestBalancerDonation --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast && kill %1
scripts.update:hooks: npm run generate:hooks && npm run version:hooks patch && npm run publish:hooks
scripts.//admin: Story 005 — local admin scripts (admin:pause from Story 006 global pauser)
scripts.//local-test-utils: Story 005 — local test utility scripts (fund user, simulate yield, fast-forward)
scripts.//collect-reward: NO_STORY — mainnet operational: collect accumulator rewards
scripts.//new-accumulator-deploy: Story 021 — deploy new stable yield accumulator to mainnet
scripts.//nft-v2-deploy: Story 043 — mainnet deploy NFTV2 and migrator
scripts.deploy:nft-v2-mainnet: node scripts/backup-mainnet-addresses.js && forge script script/DeployMainnetNFTV2.s.sol:DeployMainnetNFTV2 --rpc-url $RPC_MAINNET --broadcast --skip-simulation --slow --ledger --hd-paths "m/44'/60'/46'/0/0" -vvv && node scripts/patch-mainnet-addresses-v2.js
scripts.//nft-staking-deploy: Story 045 — mainnet deploy NFT staking differential
scripts.//nudge-pooler-deploy: Story 047 — mainnet deploy nudge accumulator + BatchMinter + BalancerPoolerV2
scripts.//eclp-pool: Story 022 — create / verify / initialize Balancer ECLP phUSD/sUSDS pool
scripts.//phusd-amm-balances: NO_STORY — mainnet operational check on AMM balances
scripts.//FixBalancerPooler: NO_STORY — mainnet operational fix on BalancerPooler
scripts.//MigrateBalancerPoolerV2Pool: Story 047 — migrate BalancerPoolerV2 to canonical phUSD/sUSDS pool
scripts.//TransferBPTToPoolerV2: NO_STORY — mainnet operational: transfer BPT into PoolerV2
scripts.//RedeployMintPageViewV2: Story 048 — redeploy MintPageView reading new dispatcher slot
scripts.//FixBalancerPoolerV2SetMinter: NO_STORY — mainnet operational fix (set minter on PoolerV2)
scripts.FixBalancerPoolerV2SetMinter: forge script script/FixBalancerPoolerV2SetMinter.s.sol:FixBalancerPoolerV2SetMinter --rpc-url $RPC_MAINNET --broadcast --skip-simulation --slow --ledger --hd-paths "m/44'/60'/46'/0/0" -vvv && echo '\n=== Broadcast complete — verifying via mainnet-fork nudge mint simulation ===\n' && npm run FixBalancerPoolerV2SetMinter:simulate-current
scripts.//AuthorizeOwnerAsPoolerV2: Story 048 — authorize owner as PoolerV2 caller (companion to dispatcher cutover)
scripts.//RescuePoolAndDonateUSDC: NO_STORY — mainnet operational rescue (pool drain + USDC donation)
scripts.//sim-eclp-rebalance: NO_STORY — fork simulation of ECLP rebalance
scripts.//buy-phusd: NO_STORY — mainnet operational governance: buy phUSD with sUSDS
scripts.//activate-erc4626: Story 035 — activate ERC4626 yield strategy (DOLA) on mainnet
scripts.//activate-erc4626-usdc: NO_STORY — mainnet operational governance: activate USDC ERC4626 yield strategy
scripts.//deploy-usde-ys: Story 037 — deploy ERC4626 market USDe YieldStrategy on mainnet
scripts.//mint-phusd-usde: NO_STORY — mainnet operational: mint phUSD with USDe
scripts.//autousdc-full-migrate: NO_STORY — mainnet operational governance: full migration of AutoUSDC
scripts.//unpause-ys-dola: NO_STORY — mainnet operational governance: unpause DOLA YieldStrategy
scripts.//unpause-ys-usde: NO_STORY — mainnet operational governance: unpause USDe YieldStrategy
scripts.//set-discount-rate: NO_STORY — mainnet operational admin: set discount rate
scripts.//set-depletion: NO_STORY — mainnet operational admin: set depletion duration
scripts.//autousdc-swap-accumulator: NO_STORY — mainnet operational governance: swap accumulator's USDC strategy
scripts.//test-integration-usde: Story 036 — integration test for ERC4626 market + USDe fork
scripts.//dispatcher-replace: Story 048 — NFT dispatcher V1→V2 cutover at index 4
scripts.//phlimbo-v1-to-v2: Story 049 — PhlimboEA V1 → PhlimboV2 silent staker migration (snapshot stakers, then migrate)
scripts.migrate-phlimbo-v1-to-v2:broadcast: node scripts/check-phlimbo-snapshot-age.js --max-hours 24 --fail-on-stale && node scripts/backup-mainnet-addresses.js && forge script script/MigratePhlimboV1ToV2.s.sol:MigratePhlimboV1ToV2 --rpc-url $RPC_MAINNET --broadcast --skip-simulation --slow --ledger --hd-paths "m/44'/60'/46'/0/0" -vvv && node scripts/update-mainnet-addresses-phlimbo-v2.js
scripts.//rewire-sya-to-phlimbo-v2: Story 049 follow-up — repoint StableYieldAccumulator at PhlimboV2 (setPhlimbo + approvePhlimbo) and redeploy DepositView with V2 baked into its immutable. DepositPageView is deprecated and intentionally NOT redeployed.
scripts.//RestoreMintAtIndex4: Story 048 follow-up — re-enable NFTMinterV2 dispatcher index 4 + repoint ViewRouter 'mint' to index-4 MintPageView
scripts.//SetMinterOnIndex4Pooler: Story 048 follow-up — authorize NFTMinterV2 on new index-4 BalancerPoolerV2 (cutover step 11 was skipped)
scripts.//TempSimulate40MintsIndex4: TEMP — delete after use. Fork-simulates 40 mints at index 4 (applies pending owner fixes via prank, deals 482 USDS, loops mint)
scripts.//SetBatchDonationSizeIndex4: Story 048 follow-up — set batchDonationSize back to 10% on new index-4 pooler (cutover mirrored a zeroed value)
scripts.//DisableNudgeAndDivertDonations: NO_STORY — mainnet operational stop-gap for the BatchNFTMinter nudge drain: zero SYA nudgeSplit (stop the claim() USDC drip) + redirect pool donations to owner + disable BatchNFTMinter nudge. Holds until the minter-pinned BatchNFTMinter ships. See docs/batch-nft-minter-nudge-drain-fix.md
scripts.//batch-minter-replace: Story 050 — redeploy fixed BatchNFTMinter, repoint SYA + BalancerPoolerV2, seed nudge pot from BPT, retire old contract
scripts.//verify-stable-staker: Story 051 — end-to-end StableStaker config verification (deploy, stake, evm_increaseTime 1 day, claim+withdraw, assert ~10 phUSD reward + principal/baseline restored)
scripts.//ss-migrate-initiate: Story 054 — migration set 1/2: initiate 24h withdrawal window on the 3 live yield strategies (DOLA/USDC/USDe), client=phUSD minter
scripts.//ss-migrate-execute: Story 055 — migration set 2/2: execute withdrawals, deploy new yield strategies (USDe = ERC4626MarketYieldStrategy + CurveAMMAdapter @30bps; sUSDe cooldown blocks plain redeem), cut over minter+SYA (incl. remove old), re-deposit principal, deploy+wire StableStaker (USDe 10 / USDC 7 / DOLA 5 phUSD-day, 10% buffer), update mainnet-addresses
scripts.//dispatcher-replace-sky-pooler: Story 056 — cut index-4 dispatcher over to a Sky-PSM BalancerPoolerV2 + new MintDebtHook (migrate BPT+sUSDS, manual Sky-route validation, final pool())
scripts.//PoolBalancerPoolerV2: NO_STORY — mainnet operational: compute a slippage-protected minBPT (off-chain router quote via compute-min-bpt-poolerv2.js, minus SLIPPAGE_BPS) then invoke pool(minBPT) on the live Sky-PSM BalancerPoolerV2 (0x7f74…786b), LP-adding accrued sUSDS into the canonical phUSD/sUSDS pool. Override floor via MIN_BPT_WEI / slippage via SLIPPAGE_BPS.
scripts.//SetBatchDonationSizeZeroIndex4: NO_STORY — mainnet operational stop for the BatchNFTMinter self-refund bug: the Sky-route index-4 pooler (0x7f74…786b) donates 10% USDS→USDC into the BatchNFTMinter DURING each mint, and the post-loop nudge refunds that donation to the same 40-batcher — so minting never tops up the pot for the next person. Zeroing batchDonationSize cleanly halts the per-mint donation (the entire bug) until the patched snapshot-before-loop BatchNFTMinter is migrated. SYA's 30% nudgeSplit is intentionally LEFT UNTOUCHED — funding the nudge pot from claims and letting a 40-batcher scoop the existing pot is the intended incentive, not part of this bug. Reversible: the :restore entry sets it back to 10% AFTER migration (DONATION_SIZE override). See docs/BatchNFTMint/self-refund-fix-and-migration-plan.md
scripts.//mint-sell-donate: NO_STORY — mainnet operational: top up the BatchNFTMinter USDC pot by minting 130 phUSD (signer's authorized-minter role), selling it for sUSDS on the canonical Balancer V3 50/50 phUSD/sUSDS pool (0x642BB6…db04), redeeming sUSDS→USDS (ERC4626), then routing the USDS→USDC via the Sky PSM (0xA188…f98c, buyGem) delivered straight to BatchNFTMinter (0x6e98…5071) — mirroring the live Sky-route pooler's donation path. An optional owner gas-comp slice (OWNER_COMP_PHUSD_WEI, default 0 = off) can be paid to the owner as USDS (NOT sUSDS, so a later run's sweep can't reclaim it). Swap minAmountOut is sized from a live snapshot-reverted querySwap minus SLIPPAGE_BPS (default 100=1%); override floor via MIN_SUSDS_OUT_WEI, donation via BATCH_DONATION_PHUSD_WEI (default 130e18), owner gas comp via OWNER_COMP_PHUSD_WEI (default 0 = off).
scripts.//batch-minter-migrate: Story 057 — deploy self-refund-fixed BatchNFTMinter (nft-staking 5f863d2), repoint SYA + Sky BalancerPoolerV2, drain FULL old USDC pot into new instance, restore pooler batchDonationSize=15% (owner raised 10→15 on 2026-06-10), retire old contract, then pre-fill StableStaker (0xbce8…079A) set-aside buffers: sell BUFFER_PHUSD_WEI phUSD (default 100e18; wallet balance first, mint shortfall) for sUSDS on Balancer V3, unwrap to USDS, split in equal thirds → USDC via Sky PSM (one third direct to staker), USDe via Curve USDe/USDC 0x0295…4d72, DOLA via Curve DOLA-3CRV 0xAA5A…927D exchange_underlying — all in one atomic helper tx with querySwap/get_dy-sized floors (SLIPPAGE_BPS default 100) and a >5%-off-par depeg circuit breaker
scripts.//buy-usds: NO_STORY — mainnet operational: mint enough phUSD (over-estimated, signer's authorized-minter role) to obtain TARGET_USDS_WEI worth of USDS (default 1100e18) from the only phUSD venue — the canonical Balancer V3 50/50 phUSD/sUSDS pool (0x642BB6…db04) — then DISTRIBUTE it. A throwaway MintBuyDistributeHelper atomically: EXACT-OUT buys exactly previewWithdraw(target) sUSDS (spend capped at maxAmountIn = live snapshot-reverted querySwapExactOut quote + SLIPPAGE_BPS, default 200=2%); redeems sUSDS→USDS (ERC4626, asserts >= target); sells exactly USDC_OUT_6DP USDC (default 1000e6) via the Sky PSM (0xA188…f98c, 1:1) to recipient 0x287004…2b48; sells ALL remaining USDS for native ETH (USDS→USDC via PSM, USDC→WETH on Uniswap V3 0.05% pool floored by a live QuoterV2 quote − ETH_SLIPPAGE_BPS default 100=1%, unwrapped) to the same recipient; and BURNS the leftover phUSD surplus. Override via TARGET_USDS_WEI, USDC_OUT_6DP, SLIPPAGE_BPS, ETH_SLIPPAGE_BPS, or hard-set the phUSD budget via MAX_PHUSD_IN_WEI.
scripts.//ss-migrate-resume: Story 055 RESUME — finish the halted 2026-06-10 execute run (stopped at tx 21/59: forge baked stale simulated drain deltas into deposit calldata; live drains returned less). Re-deposits the ACTUAL drained amounts (from drain receipt Transfer logs), completes minter/SYA cutover + StableStaker deploy/wiring. Idempotent — safe to re-run. mainnet-addresses.ts must be patched BY HAND afterward (positional patcher is stale).
scripts.//mint-sell-to-deployer: NO_STORY — mainnet operational: MINT MINT_PHUSD_WEI phUSD (default 100e18; wallet balance NEVER spent — mint only) and sell it for sUSDS on the canonical Balancer V3 phUSD/sUSDS pool, unwrap to USDS, split in equal thirds → USDC via Sky PSM (one third direct), USDe via Curve USDe/USDC 0x0295…4d72, DOLA via Curve DOLA-3CRV 0xAA5A…927D exchange_underlying — all three credited to the DEPLOYER (0xCad1…D0B6) in one atomic helper tx with querySwap/get_dy-sized floors (SLIPPAGE_BPS default 100) and a >5%-off-par depeg circuit breaker. Extracted from MigrateBatchNFTMinter's _prefillBuffers (story 057), retargeted from StableStaker to the deployer
scripts.//replace-sya: NO_STORY — mainnet operational fix: the live SYA (0x3bbe…7606a) is a pre-story-025 build whose claim() calls withdrawFrom() — a function the story-055 yield strategies replaced with skimSurplus() — so every claim reverts, and its getYield() reads the phUSD minter only (StableStaker yield invisible). Deploys the current lib/stable-yield-accumulator (skimSurplus, all-client getYield) and rewires EVERYTHING: SYA config replicated from live (USDC reward, PhlimboV2, NFTMinterV2 burn gate, BatchNFTMinter nudge, Pauser, token configs, 3 strategies, 3000bps discount) with two user-specified changes (2026-06-10): nudgeSplit 30→20 (rest to Phlimbo) and setSetAsideBuffer=25% for BOTH clients (minter + StableStaker) on ALL 3 strategies. Old SYA fully deactivated: withdrawer + burner auth revoked, unregistered from Pauser, strategy registry emptied. Preflight aborts if live state drifted; post-wire asserts verify every link + nonzero getTotalYield. The broadcast pipeline backs up mainnet-addresses.ts, then auto-patches its StableYieldAccumulator entry to the new address (via progress.replace-sya.1.json + patch-mainnet-addresses-replace-sya.js, idempotent, aborts on unknown current value). AFTERWARD: verify on Etherscan, repoint UI. Verify the fix end-to-end with: SYA_ADDRESS=<new> npm run preview-sya-claim-scx
scripts.//preview-sya-claim-scx: NO_STORY — mainnet fork diagnostic (never broadcast): impersonates the deployer (holder of 1 SCX NFT, dispatcher index 2), grants unlimited USDC approval, and attempts SYA.claim(2, 0, []) — logging per-strategy getYield vs the true all-client surplus first. Against the OLD SYA (default) this proves the claim revert is the missing withdrawFrom selector, not insufficient USDC. After replace-sya, run with SYA_ADDRESS=<new SYA> to confirm the claim succeeds and sweeps minter + StableStaker yield.

author: Behodler
